text: I feel really down today and I do not know how to get motivated.
I just found out I got the internship I wanted.
I am upset because my teammate ignored all my messages.
I am nervous about presenting in front of the whole class tomorrow.
I am so grateful for how supportive my family has been lately.
I did not expect my professor to move the deadline back by a week.
How can I organize my study schedule better?
My project is due soon and I am stressed about finishing everything.
